notes: Core loop exists but has critical bugs: bullet firing only works when bullets array is empty (single-shot but blocks rapid fire), enemy entry bezier paths are poorly tuned causing enemies to spawn off-screen awkwardly, returning state logic is broken (enemies teleport to y=-20 after dive), explosion radius calculation divides by wrong max life value, and the challenge stage is a stub with no actual gameplay.

A functional but simplified clone that uses basic shapes instead of sprites, limits the player to 1 bullet on screen, and completely omits the iconic capture beam mechanic and proper challenge stages.

Playable but simplified and notably incomplete as Galaga, with rudimentary visuals, missing signature mechanics/challenge stage implementation, and some likely logic quirks from mutating arrays during iteration.
